name: Find a cat
author: Poki
description: Find a Cat is a matching game where your goal is to help a lovely old lady find her naught cat who keeps running away! Search through drawers, closets, and every corner of the room. As you hunt for the cat, you'll encounter identical items scattered around—match these items to tidy up and organize the space, making it easier to spot the cat. Work quickly and efficiently to link all the matching items and find the cat before time runs out. Are you ready to help the old lady reunite with her cute cat? How to play Find a cat? Click to select an item. Link 2 identical items to match them. Who created Find a cat? Find a cat is created by Ginger Rat Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Find a cat for free? You can play Find a cat for free on Poki. Can I play Find a cat on mobile devices and desktop? Find a cat can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
